What We Build With AI

Nine categories of AI automation — from chatbots to custom agents, deployed in days.

AI Agents & Chatbots

Deploy 24/7 AI agents on WhatsApp, web, and email that qualify leads, answer questions, and book meetings — without human intervention.

  • AI WhatsApp Agent for Small Business
  • Automated Lead Qualification
  • Smart Chatbot Integration
  • Automated FAQ Systems

SEO & Content Automation

AI that generates, optimizes, and publishes SEO content at scale — from keyword research to internal linking, fully automated.

  • Automated SEO Content Generation
  • AI Keyword Research & Clustering
  • Automated Internal Linking
  • AI Meta Description Generator

Sales & CRM Automation

Connect your CRM to AI pipelines that score leads, trigger follow-ups, update records, and alert your sales team in real time.

  • AI Lead Scoring & Prioritization
  • Automated Sales Follow-Up
  • CRM Data Enrichment
  • AI Sales Pipeline Reporting

Operations & Workflow Automation

Eliminate repetitive manual tasks across your business. We build n8n and Zapier flows that connect your tools and run on autopilot.

  • n8n Workflow Automation
  • Automated Document Processing
  • AI Email Triage & Routing
  • Calendar & Scheduling Automation

Business Intelligence & Analytics

Turn raw data into actionable dashboards. AI that monitors KPIs, generates reports, and alerts you when numbers move.

  • Automated KPI Dashboard Reporting
  • AI Competitor Monitoring
  • Automated GA4 Reporting
  • AI Business Performance Alerts

Social Media & Marketing Automation

AI that writes, schedules, and repurposes content across LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, and more — aligned with your brand voice.

  • AI Social Media Content Generator
  • Automated LinkedIn Outreach
  • AI Email Newsletter Automation
  • Automated Content Repurposing

Finance & Accounting Automation

Automate invoice processing, expense categorization, financial reporting, and reconciliation — integrated with your accounting stack.

  • Automated Invoice Processing
  • AI Expense Categorization
  • Automated Financial Reporting
  • AI Accounts Receivable Automation

Customer Service & Support

AI support agents that resolve tickets, escalate edge cases, and learn from your knowledge base — reducing support costs by up to 80%.

  • AI Customer Support Agent
  • Automated Ticket Classification
  • AI Knowledge Base Builder
  • Customer Sentiment Analysis

Custom AI Development

Need something that doesn’t exist off the shelf? We design and build bespoke AI agents, RAG systems, and LLM-powered tools for your exact use case.

  • Custom AI Agent Development
  • RAG System Implementation
  • LLM Fine-Tuning for Business
  • AI Integration Consulting
